subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the provided multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: This is a straightforward document extraction task requiring a single extract call. All requested fields (party names, roles, contact addresses) are discrete structured data points that can be extracted in one pass. The task is simple enough for the small tier—basic field identification and parsing from a contract document, with no cross-document inference or multi-signal reconciliation needed. Assigning more subtasks or higher tiers would be over-engineering a single, well-scoped extraction task."
